project.name: AI Orchestrator Academy
project.description: A freemium elearning platform that teaches students how to become AI Orchestrators, pitches companies on how AI Orchestration can elevate their offer, drive productivity, and reduce expenses. Graduates are listed on a Job Board where they can offer coaching and consulting services.

target_audiences.description: Professionals looking to upskill in AI orchestration, career changers, freelancers wanting to offer AI consulting
Businesses looking to adopt AI orchestration to improve productivity, reduce costs, and enhance their offerings
Certified AI Orchestrators offering coaching and consulting through the Job Board

tech_stack.framework: Next.js 15 (App Router, Single Page App with dynamic routes)
tech_stack.ai_communications: Magpipe (AI agents for course lessons, tutoring, onboarding)

external_apis.name: Supabase
external_apis.purpose: Database, auth, file storage, edge functions

external_apis.name: Magpipe
external_apis.purpose: AI voice/chat agents integrated into AI communications course modules

milestone_1_mvp.name: MVP — Core Platform & Free Course
milestone_1_mvp.description: Launch the public-facing site with free course content, user auth, and progress tracking

features.name: Landing Page
features.description: Hero section with value proposition, course overview, testimonials placeholder, CTA for sign-up. Sections: What is AI Orchestration, Course Preview, Pricing, FAQ
features.user_flow: Visitor lands on page → reads value prop → clicks 'Start Free Course' → signs up

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Sign up / sign in with Email, Google, GitHub via Supabase Auth. Profile creation on first login with name, avatar, bio
features.user_flow: User clicks sign up → chooses provider → completes profile → redirected to dashboard

features.name: Course Catalog
features.description: Browse available courses and modules. Free courses are accessible immediately, paid courses show lock icon with upgrade CTA
features.user_flow: User browses catalog → clicks course → sees module list → starts free module or hits paywall

features.name: Course Player
features.description: Mixed content format: video lessons (embedded), text/markdown content, interactive exercises, quizzes. Progress auto-saved per lesson
features.user_flow: User opens lesson → watches video / reads content / completes exercise → marks complete → next lesson unlocks

features.name: Progress Tracking Dashboard
features.description: User dashboard showing enrolled courses, completion percentage, current lesson, streak tracker, achievements
features.user_flow: User logs in → sees dashboard with progress bars → clicks 'Continue' to resume where they left off

features.name: Free Course: AI Orchestration Foundations
features.description: Complete free course covering: What is AI Orchestration, Tools & Platforms Overview, Prompt Engineering Basics, Building Your First Workflow, AI Ethics & Best Practices

database_tables: profiles (id, user_id, full_name, avatar_url, bio, role, created_at)
courses (id, title, slug, description, thumbnail_url, is_free, price, order, created_at)
modules (id, course_id, title, slug, description, order, created_at)
lessons (id, module_id, title, slug, content_type, content, video_url, order, created_at)
user_progress (id, user_id, lesson_id, completed, completed_at, created_at)
subagent_jobs: Initialize Next.js project with App Router, Tailwind, shadcn/ui
Set up Supabase project, schema, RLS policies
Build course catalog and course player components

milestone_2_monetization.name: Monetization — Paid Courses, Stripe, Certificates
milestone_2_monetization.description: Add payment processing, premium course content, and certification system

features.name: For Companies Page
features.description: Dedicated B2B landing page pitching AI Orchestration benefits: productivity gains, cost reduction, competitive advantage. Includes ROI calculator placeholder, case studies section, 'Contact Us' CTA
features.user_flow: Company decision-maker lands on page → reads business benefits → submits contact form or signs up for team plan

features.name: Stripe Integration
features.description: Checkout for individual courses and subscription plans. Plans: Free, Pro ($29/mo), Team ($99/mo). Webhook handling for payment events
features.user_flow: User clicks upgrade → selects plan → Stripe checkout → payment confirmed → premium content unlocked

features.name: Premium Course: CrewAI Mastery
features.description: Deep-dive into building multi-agent systems with CrewAI. Includes hands-on projects, code exercises, and a capstone project

features.name: Premium Course: LangGraph Advanced
features.description: Master stateful, multi-step AI workflows with LangGraph. Covers graph design, state management, human-in-the-loop patterns

features.name: Premium Course: AI Communications with Magpipe
features.description: Learn to build AI-powered communication systems using Magpipe. Voice agents, chat agents, phone automation, SMS workflows. Students interact with live Magpipe agents during lessons
modules: Live Practice: Talk to Your Agent

features.name: Certification System
features.description: Upon completing all modules in a course + passing final assessment, user receives a verifiable certificate with unique ID. Shareable on LinkedIn
features.user_flow: User completes all lessons → takes final assessment → passes → certificate generated → can share/download

database_tables: subscriptions (id, user_id, stripe_customer_id, stripe_subscription_id, plan, status, current_period_end, created_at)
payments (id, user_id, stripe_payment_id, amount, currency, status, created_at)
certificates (id, user_id, course_id, certificate_number, issued_at, assessment_score)
assessment_attempts (id, user_id, assessment_id, score, passed, attempted_at)
subagent_jobs: Integrate Stripe checkout, webhooks, subscription management
Build premium course content and paywall logic
Build certification system with PDF generation
Integrate Magpipe agents into AI Communications course modules

milestone_3_job_board.name: Job Board & Community
milestone_3_job_board.description: Launch the graduate Job Board and community features

features.name: Graduate Job Board
features.description: Certified graduates can create a public profile listing their skills, certifications, hourly rate, and availability. Companies can browse, filter, and contact graduates directly
features.user_flow: Graduate completes certification → opts into Job Board → fills profile (skills, rate, bio, portfolio) → appears in public directory

features.name: Company Directory Access
features.description: Companies can browse the Job Board, filter by skills/certifications/rate, and send contact requests to graduates
features.user_flow: Company signs up → browses Job Board → filters by skill → clicks 'Contact' → message sent to graduate

features.name: Graduate Public Profile
features.description: Each graduate gets a public profile page showing certifications, skills, bio, portfolio links, testimonials, and contact CTA
features.user_flow: Visitor clicks graduate name → sees full profile → clicks 'Hire Me' or 'Contact'

features.name: Contact & Messaging
features.description: Simple contact request system. Companies send a message, graduate gets email notification, can respond via platform
features.user_flow: Company sends message → graduate notified → responds → conversation continues in platform

database_tables: job_board_profiles (id, user_id, headline, bio, skills, hourly_rate, availability, portfolio_url, is_public, created_at)
contact_requests (id, from_user_id, to_user_id, message, status, created_at)
messages (id, contact_request_id, sender_id, body, read_at, created_at)
subagent_jobs: Build Job Board listing page with search and filters
Build contact request and messaging system
Add Job Board opt-in to user settings

free_tier.description: Complete introduction to AI Orchestration — enough to understand the role and start building

paid_tier.description: Build production multi-agent systems with CrewAI
Master stateful AI workflows with LangGraph

paid_tier.format: Video + Text + Live AI Agent Interaction + Capstone
paid_tier.description: Build AI voice and chat agents with Magpipe — students interact with live agents during lessons
